rag_rules: Match AGREE content scope to owner kind: type-scope content belongs on a component type, and implementation-scope content belongs on a component implementation.
Use the analyzed AADL model as the source of truth for valid owners and scopes, and preserve the existing architecture during fusion.
generic_rules: Insert the annex with minimal structural change and keep existing features, subcomponents, connections, and properties intact.
When fusing implementation-scope content, place it where any referenced structural declarations remain in scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE content is wrapped as `annex agree {** ... **};` under the chosen owner.
anti_patterns: Do not move type-scope content into an implementation owner or implementation-only content into a type owner.
Do not invent owners, rename model elements, or make unrelated architectural edits while inserting the annex.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
